output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel(COUNT(*) AS ?wins) WHERE {
  wd:Q84933 wdt:P361 ?edition .
  ?edition wdt:P1937 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?winner ?winnerLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?wins)
LIMIT 1

ORDER BY DESC(?wins)
LIMIT 1
